creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
On Apr 22, 2011, at 9:33 AM, Jim Riggs wrote:

> On Apr 22, 2011, at 9:17 AM, Florian Smeets wrote:
> 
>> it does not build on any of our supported branches:
>> 
>> http://tb.smeets.im/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=392
>> 
>> Do you have a system newer than 6.x where you can test your patch?
> 
> I did all of my patching and testing on 8.2.  I only did the submit on 6.
> 
> I do have IPv6 turned off in my tests and in make.conf, so let me try again with IPv6 enabled.  >:-(


Please add the attached patch to files/.  They had a bug reported for this that they have subsequently fixed.
